acts.title: Jack-In
acts.setting: The R34L Room flickers as the PED finishes its handshake with the N3T.

dialogue.speaker: Trinity
dialogue.line: The N3T remembers what the PED forgets.

dialogue.speaker: Eternity
dialogue.line: You were never supposed to reach this tile.

dialogue.speaker: Trinity
dialogue.line: They deleted the exit. So we build one.

dialogue.speaker: NetAdmin
dialogue.line: I am the part of you that refused to decrypt.

dialogue.speaker: Tyranny
dialogue.line: You were never supposed to reach this tile.

dialogue.speaker: Trinity
dialogue.line: If we win, nobody credits the deleted accounts. Fine.

acts.narration: Act I closes on the Jack-In. The R34L Room flickers as the PED finishes its handshake with the N3T. The choice you make here seeds the next act's grid.
acts.next_act_gate: Unlock ACTII by holding soul integrity above the cracked band.
